query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trademark_searches (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  businessName VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  searchDate TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  totalResults INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  exactMatch BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  conflictRisk ENUM('none', 'low', 'medium', 'high') DEFAULT 'none' NOT NULL,
  resultsJson TEXT,
  recommendationsJson TEXT,
  entityId VARCHAR(36),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trademark_searches (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  businessName VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  searchDate TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  totalResults INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  exactMatch BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  conflictRisk ENUM('none', 'low', 'medium', 'high') DEFAULT 'none' NOT NULL,
  resultsJson TEXT,
  recommendationsJson TEXT,
  entityId VARCHAR(36),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
